achievements.description: World Cup Predictor Game Figma design COMPLETED (GDCU-8935, Miguel Migneco, Done 15:17 BST) — full end-to-end design covering entry flow, group stage (48 matches), knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, scoring breakdown, empty/error states, and mobile-first at 3 breakpoints. Miguel notified Mike via DM at 13:35. Kelvin Yee immediately kicked off backend development — GDCU-8995 (DB/API) and GDCU-8996 (Admin Panel) both moved to In Progress by EOD. Mike shared WC Predictor banners folder with Dean/Shaun/Josh at 14:56.

Cycle 9 Q2 Week 2 shipped — Chloe Christie announced in #gdc-core at 10:41 BST. Delivered: In-App Age Gate (GDCU-8806 ✅), ACE Navigation Redesign with Global Nav Bar (GDCU-8936 ✅), VIP Operator List BI Test (GDCU-8847 ✅), CA/FR Oplist Redesign with compare function, Local Navigation for News Pages, Cool Tones Phase 2 Fixes (GDCU-8955 ✅), Duplicate Payment Methods fix (Iceland/EN brands), SEO Page Bloat improvements (GDCU-8874 ✅). Cycle closed at 121.5 SP.

Post-Cycle 9 CWV scores confirmed improved — UK online casinos page median now ~60-74 (up from 39-50 pre-release), AT blackjack-strategies page median 74+ (peaking 80+). Novica confirmed in #gdc-pod at ~15:38 after running multiple PageSpeed Insights tests. Approx. 10-12 point improvement from CWV ticket and CSS extraction work.

Cosmo Spins portrait mode hotfix shipped (GDCU-9007, Harden Wallace, Done 12:36 BST). Social ad traffic from Instagram was blocked by the landscape-only enforcement. Harden removed the rotation block; further update pushed live at 16:59 — mobile users now have the game rotated into a landscape perspective natively so it works even when the social app blocks device rotation. Team confirmed acceptable for the current social promo window.

Mobile App renamed to Cosmo Spins — GDCU-8982 Done (Carlos Blauth, 15:48 BST). Android package ID, Kotlin package, iOS bundle ID, OAuth URL scheme, and app name all migrated to com.gambling.cosmospins. Dart package renamed cosmo_spins. Firebase files intentionally untouched — GDCU-8981 (Firebase Migration, now In Product) is the next step.
Italy Casino Bonus page oplist reduced to 10 operators with Show More button (GDCU-8964, Harden Wallace, Done 12:01 BST). Mirrors existing UK casino bonus page pattern.
IUJ Refer a Friend CTA colour updated from black to blue to match platform design system (GDCU-8795, Novica Vukobratovic, Done 12:00 BST).

Cycle 10 dev kickoff: Kelvin Yee started WC Predictor DB/API (GDCU-8995 🔥 In Progress) and WC Predictor Admin Panel (GDCU-8996 🔥 In Progress). Novica started CWV Online Casinos improvements (GDCU-8998 🔥 In Progress) and portrait mode investigation (GDCU-9009 In Progress). Carlos started Bloomreach SDK integration (GDCU-8809 In Progress).

GEM-83 raised for Saila Lehto (Voxwise/Bloomreach) partnership. Conversation today (DM, 15:16–15:45) about Bloomreach email capture: account managers want product incentives for organic user sign-up (prizes, spins, free plays). Mike set up GEM-83 and confirmed scope with Saila.

meeting_summaries.title: Cycle 9 Q2 Week 2 Release — Sprint Close Announcement
meeting_summaries.summary: Chloe Christie posted the Cycle 9 Q2 Week 2 release summary in #gdc-core. No Confluence meeting notes found for a formal sprint ceremony today. The cycle closed at 121.5 SP. Key Cycle 10 priorities shared: Tabs Component Image Field (GDCU-8927 🔥), Country Link Shortcode (GDCU-8952), AB Testing UK Tenancy Removal (GDCU-8839), Standard.UK partnership setup, WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (GDCU-8396 🔥), CWV Online Casinos (GDCU-8998 🔥), Rewards Banners (GDCU-8958 🔥). FTP App tickets: Push Notifications (GDCU-8809), Apple App in GDC Trading Limited (GDCU-8969), App rename done (GDCU-8982 ✅). WC Predictor dev starts immediately (GDCU-8995, GDCU-8996).
decisions: Cycle 9 closed — all planned tickets shipped, including GDCU-8806, GDCU-8936, GDCU-8847 from Mike's review queue
Cycle 10 begins — WC Predictor dev is the #1 priority given 11 June hard deadline
Cosmo Spins portrait mode fix released as emergency hotfix to unblock social ad traffic (GDCU-9007)
action_items_from_meeting: Mike to formally review WC Predictor Figma and confirm handoff to Kelvin's dev tickets (GDCU-8995, GDCU-8996)
Cycle 10 UX WIP queue to be prioritised Monday: Group Bets (GDCU-8904), WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (GDCU-8392), Cosmo Spins Wheel Redesign (GDCU-8764), Stable Stars (GDCU-8538)

meeting_summaries.title: Cosmo Spins Portrait Mode — Emergency Debug (Ad-hoc, Group DM + #gdc-pod)
meeting_summaries.summary: Full-day thread in group DM (Chloe, Dean, Josh Kerr, Shane, Harden, Gabriel, Novica, Robin, Mike) and #gdc-pod around Cosmo Spins being unplayable from social ads due to portrait mode block. Chloe flagged the game was built for landscape only. Novica identified bugs (auth modal orientation flip, click-lock on re-open). Harden shipped GDCU-9007 removing the rotation block (Done 12:36). Chloe confirmed Novica's fixes released to production at 12:34. Harden pushed a further live update at 16:59 — game now auto-rotates to landscape natively on mobile. Shane/Robin tested on iPhone: some edge-case behaviour noted but team agreed acceptable for the social promo duration.
decisions: Ship as hotfix immediately — accepted edge-case iOS behaviour for social promo window
Novica to investigate further via GDCU-9009 for a more robust portrait mode solution next week
Josh Kerr to test the full Instagram ad → Cosmo Spins flow end-to-end
action_items_from_meeting: Josh Kerr: test Cosmo Spins from Instagram ad link and report outcome in group DM
Novica: continue GDCU-9009 portrait mode investigation for longer-term fix
Monitor for further issues next week if Josh identifies problems

action_points.action: REVIEW WC PREDICTOR FIGMA — Miguel completed the full design (GDCU-8935 Done, DM 13:35). Open Figma, review against acceptance criteria, add Figma link to Jira GDCU-8935. Kelvin is already on GDCU-8995 (DB/API) and GDCU-8996 (Admin Panel) — align on design spec at Monday Mike/Mig catch-up. 11 June hard deadline.

REVIEW GDCU-8981 FIREBASE MIGRATION — New In Product (Carlos Blauth, updated 15:21 BST). Gated on GDCU-8982 (app rename, Done today). Firebase project migration to apps@gdcgroup.com account is critical path for app store submission pipeline. Review and approve or provide feedback Monday.

REVIEW GDCU-8927 TABS COMPONENT IMAGE FIELDS — New In Product (Harden Wallace, updated 11:53, 🔥 flagged). Cycle 10 high-priority feature. Review Harden's implementation and approve or provide feedback.

RESPOND TO CIARA — In-game messaging option 1 vs 2 (DM sent 15:55, unanswered at EOD). Ciara is designing the WC Cosmo Spins reskin (GDCU-8392). This decision blocks her design progress. Decide and reply before her Monday Sync at 10:00.

VIC DADSON RETURNS MONDAY 18/05 — Signed off until 16 May; first working day back is Monday. (1) Wellbeing check-in first — do not open with workload. (2) Re-establish BI/data engineering plan — Nemanja requirements discussion deferred. (3) Brief Colin Brannigan on return plan before or after. She is listed in the GDCU Assemble standup at 14:30.

GDCU-8958 REWARDS BANNERS — Chloe flagged in #gdc-product-design-pod at 14:02: Harden needs support and has left a comment on this Cycle 10 🔥 ticket. Read Harden's comment and action — assign a supporting resource or unblock directly. Use the 11:40 focus block.

GDCU-8948 PRIZE BOXES 5TH BOX — Was In Product with Jessica (4+ days as of 11/05). Confirm current status Monday — was this cleared in Cycle 9 or still outstanding? If still awaiting review, action before the Design Team Sync at 14:00.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — Still Blocked (Harden, Day 10+). Apple/Google org-level accounts. Contact RotoWire to check if GDC Group org accounts already exist — could shortcut 6-8 week wait to 1-2 weeks. App store submission pipeline depends on this.

GROUP BETS DESIGN (GDCU-8904) — Listed WIP in Cycle 10 UX plan (Chloe's release notes today). Original design target was 07/05. Check current status with Miguel at Monday catch-up — if design is ready or near-ready, book WC Group Bets dev KO call immediately. 11 June hard deadline.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Was blocked in QA since 06/05 (Sanja Budic). Sanja said fix was done 07/05 but ticket never unblocked. Confirm with Sanja Monday: is QA running? Update ticket status. Butlin, Dan Smullen, Gabriel are stakeholders.

SAILA LEHTO / VOXWISE FOLLOW-UP — GEM-83 raised today. Bloomreach account managers want product incentives for email sign-up (prizes, spins, free plays). Explore whether IUJ chip rewards, Cosmo Spins free plays, or WC Predictor access can form the offer. Confirm next steps with Saila.

COSMO SPINS PORTRAIT MODE MONITORING — Harden's hotfix is live. Josh Kerr to test from Instagram ad — no confirmation received by EOD. Check group DM Monday for Josh's test result. Novica's GDCU-9009 investigation is In Progress for the longer-term fix.

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN (GDCU-8392) — Still WIP in Cycle 10 (Ciara). Hard deadline 11 June. Confirm Ciara's sprint timeline at Monday Sync. She also needs the in-game messaging decision (option 1/2) to continue.

GDCU-8619 OPERATOR LIST REDESIGN — Was blocked Day 21+ (Ciara). CA/FR Oplist Redesign shipped in Cycle 9 (possible related delivery). Confirm with Ciara at Monday Sync whether the original GDCU-8619 blocker (Michael Butlin gate) is now resolved or still open.

next_working_day.title: Monday Sync
next_working_day.synopsis: Weekly 1:1 with direct report Ciara Carroll. Ciara sent a DM today at 15:55 asking for a decision on in-game messaging options 1 vs 2 for the WC Cosmo Spins reskin — unanswered at EOD. This is the likely lead topic. She is also running WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (GDCU-8392) and Operator List Redesign (GDCU-8619 — was blocked Day 21+).
discussion_topics: In-game messaging decision: option 1 or 2 for WC Cosmo Spins reskin — DECIDE BEFORE CALL
WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (GDCU-8392) — sprint timeline to hit 11 June hard deadline
GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign — CA/FR oplist shipped in Cycle 9; confirm if original blocker resolved
Vic Dadson return — any impact on Ciara's data/analytics dependencies
next_working_day.prep_notes: Decide on in-game messaging option 1 vs 2 before the call — review whatever design options Ciara sent. Check GDCU-8619 current Jira status. Know WC deadline constraints: 11 June for both WC Cosmo Spins Reskin and Group Bets.

next_working_day.title: Mike/Mig Catch Up
next_working_day.synopsis: Weekly 1:1 with direct report Miguel Migneco. Miguel completed WC Predictor Game design today (GDCU-8935 Done 15:17) and notified Mike at 13:35. Kelvin has already started dev (GDCU-8995, GDCU-8996 both In Progress). This is the formal design handoff meeting.
discussion_topics: WC Predictor design handoff — walk through Figma, confirm link added to Jira GDCU-8935, any open design questions for Kelvin
GDCU-8995 (DB/API) and GDCU-8996 (Admin Panel) — is the design spec sufficient for dev to proceed without a KO call?
Group Bets widget (GDCU-8904) — current design status; when can dev KO call be booked?
Cycle 10 UX next priorities: Cosmo Spins Wheel Redesign (GDCU-8764), Stable Stars (GDCU-8538) — agree order
next_working_day.prep_notes: Review the WC Predictor Figma link from Miguel's DM (13:35) before this call so you can formally sign off the design. Have a view on Cycle 10 UX priority order. Know whether Group Bets needs a KO call this week.

next_working_day.title: Project
next_working_day.synopsis: Personal focus block — no attendees listed. Good window for deep review work between the morning 1:1s and afternoon syncs.
next_working_day.prep_notes: Use this 80-minute block to clear: (1) GDCU-8981 Firebase Migration In Product review (Carlos), (2) GDCU-8927 Tabs Component Image Fields In Product review (Harden), (3) GDCU-8958 Rewards Banners support response.

next_working_day.title: Weekly Design Team Sync
next_working_day.synopsis: Weekly design team sync — all three direct reports. Purpose: review active work, share blockers, coordinate dependencies. First full sync following Cycle 9 close and WC Predictor design completion today.
discussion_topics: Miguel: WC Predictor design handoff confirmation; Cycle 10 next UX priority
Ciara: WC Cosmo Spins Reskin timeline; in-game messaging decision (should be confirmed from 10:00 sync)
Jessica: GDCU-8948 Prize Boxes 5th Box status; Group Bets widget (GDCU-8904); GDCU-8906 NL Claude Tables start date
Cycle 10 UX queue — agree priority order: Group Bets, Stable Stars, Cosmo Spins Wheel, Reskin
next_working_day.prep_notes: Come with Cycle 10 UX priority order confirmed from the Mike/Mig catch-up. Know Jessica's GDCU-8948 status — check Jira beforehand. Have the in-game messaging decision confirmed for Ciara.

next_working_day.title: GDCU Assemble 💥 Standup
next_working_day.synopsis: Full GDCU Assemble team standup — first standup of Cycle 10. Immediately follows the Design Team Sync. Organised by Chloe Christie. Victoria Dadson is listed as an attendee — this will be her first day back from sick leave (signed off until 16 May). 22-person meeting.
discussion_topics: Cycle 10 sprint kick-off — WC Predictor dev, Rewards Banners, WC Cosmo Spins Reskin as top priorities
WC Predictor dev status (Kelvin) — DB/API and Admin Panel both In Progress from Friday
Cosmo Spins portrait mode (Novica) — GDCU-9009 investigation underway; Josh Kerr Instagram ad test result
GDCU-8958 Rewards Banners — Harden flagged needing support on Friday
next_working_day.prep_notes: Prepare a 60-second Cycle 10 priorities summary. Know the answer to the GDCU-8958 Rewards Banners support ask. Welcome Vic back briefly in the standup — detailed re-onboarding is a separate 1:1, keep it warm but short.
